loop1.title: Events KPI Strip
loop1.note: Showing event counts and worst deviations for the panel's fed feeders (PRIMARY side); some members (Axial Fan Panel-2, Curing Line CSU-01, Fire Fighting System, Domestic Water Pump) are dark and honest-blank their slots.

loop1.title: AI Summary
loop1.note: Showing AI narrative summary; numeric event stats (sag/swell/current/neutral) are not measured by this meter class and are omitted.

loop1.title: Event Timeline at {period}
loop1.note: Showing event counts and worst deviations for members with live data (FCBC-1, AHU-1, AHU-2, AHU-3, AHU-9 South, AHU-10 South, AHU-11 South, Electrical Room External-South, Chiller & CHW CWP-1/2/3/4, PCW Panel, AHU-4, General Exhaust, PDB For RM, Irrigation Water Pump, Air Washer-1/2/3, Axial Fan Panel-4, Exhaust Fan-1/2/3); Axial Fan Panel-2, Curing Line CSU-01, Fire Fighting System, Domestic Water Pump, Solar Incomers, and Transformer-08 are dark (no data) and honest-blanked.

loop1.title: Current Distribution at {period}
loop1.note: Showing current distribution across outgoing feeders; some feeders (Axial Fan Panel-2, Curing Line CSU-01, Fire Fighting System, Domestic Water Pump) have no live data and are omitted from the roster.

loop1.title: Other Panels Event at {period}
loop1.note: Showing per-panel event counts and voltage/current metrics for the 24 active feeders; 4 feeders (Axial Fan Panel-2, Curing Line CSU-01, Fire Fighting System, Domestic Water Pump) are dark and honest-blanked.
